dedup_decision.horizon_boundary: Horizon remains a later 5.S2 Topic Radar / Content Intake strengthening candidate, not a peer 5.7 runtime.

local_contract_evidence.cli_build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-marketing-skill-pattern-library --output artifacts/audits/section_5/ai_marketing_skills_pattern_library/marketing_pattern_library --library-name "HeiTang Marketing Skill Pattern Library"

why_real_integration: A local original Marketing Skill Pattern Library is implemented and validated.
The run produced non-empty pattern cards, workflow patterns, an index, a report, and a validation report.
The capability adds product value to Template Library and Skill Factory pattern selection without copying or executing the external project.
boundaries: real_integration means local original marketing pattern library only.
No ai-marketing-skills runtime, code, prompt files, SKILL.md files, scripts, or repository contents are bundled.
No crawler, paid media execution, account operation, financial automation, or revenue guarantee is implemented.
UI may show status, preview, and future Topic Radar slot only; full UI workflow remains a later campaign.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.8 through 5.14, strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 final consistency gate, external Skill learning E2E, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, Core Bridge, configuration, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
